name: Sougayilang Spinning Fishing Rod Combo
description: 2-piece 5'6" graphite and fiberglass rod with spinning reel. Great all-around combo for walleye, pike, and bass fishing in Quebec.

name: Piscifun Flame Spinning Reel
description: Ultralight spinning reel with 5.2:1 gear ratio and smooth drag. Perfect for trout, walleye, and perch fishing.

name: Fishing Lures Kit 126-Piece Set
description: Comprehensive kit with crankbaits, frogs, minnows, soft baits, hooks and weights. Covers everything from panfish to pike.

name: Berkley PowerBait Trout Dough - Garlic Scent
description: Synthetic dough bait with powerful garlic scent. The go-to bait for stocked and wild trout across Quebec waters.

name: Berkley PowerBait Trout Bait Assortment
description: Assorted PowerBait in multiple colors. Works for brook trout, rainbow trout, and splake in lakes and rivers.

name: Circle Hooks 150-Pack 2X Strong
description: Strong offset circle hooks ideal for live bait fishing. Works great for walleye, pike, and catfish with minimal gut hooking.

name: Piscifun Lunker Braided Fishing Line (30lb)
description: Super-strong 8-strand braided line with zero stretch. Excellent sensitivity and casting distance for pike, musky, and bass.

name: Fishing Lures Kit with Soft Baits and Spoons
description: Versatile kit with VIBs, frogs, minnows, soft baits, and hooks. Covers all Quebec freshwater species.

name: Collapsible Fishing Net with Telescoping Handle
description: Folding landing net with extendable aluminum handle. Rubber mesh is gentle on fish. Essential for landing big pike, musky, and lake trout.

name: Fishing Pliers with Hook Remover and Braid Cutter
description: Stainless steel pliers with built-in hook remover and line cutter. Necessary for safely removing deep hooks from pike and musky.

name: Quantum 202 Freshwater Spincast Reel
description: Simple spincast reel with 2.8:1 gear ratio. Great for beginners and kids. Works well for panfish and stocked trout.

name: Telescopic Fishing Net for Ice Fishing
description: Collapsible ice fishing net with telescopic handle. Perfect for landing lake trout and whitefish through the ice.

name: Doryum Fish Hooks 600-Pack Assorted Sizes
description: 600 hooks in 10 sizes. Includes circle hooks, J-hooks, and offset hooks for everything from perch to pike.

name: Sougayilang Telescopic Fishing Rod Combo
description: Telescopic rod and spinning reel combo. Portable and easy to carry. Great for travel and shore fishing across Quebec.

name: Braided Fishing Line Ultra-Strong Zero Stretch
description: Thinner braided line with superior abrasion resistance. Excellent for casting distance and detecting light bites from walleye and perch.
